heroHeadline: El Mayo Zambada Sentencing Set for April 13; Argentina Designates CJNG as Terrorist Organization
heroSubtitle: 611 days of intra-cartel war since Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada's alleged kidnapping — 2,400+ homicides, 9,000+ families displaced. La Mayiza controls approximately 90% of former Chapitos territory. El Mayo faces mandatory life imprisonment at his April 13 Brooklyn sentencing; defense memo due March 30. Argentina designated CJNG — Los Chapitos' ally — a terrorist organization on March 26, 2026, following El Mencho's February death. Los Chapitos security chief 'El Chuta' (Jesus Omar Ibarra Felix) indicted in Chicago on narcoterrorism charges, a product of ongoing Guzmán sons cooperation.
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae
